summary: Tests cover main parsing, aggregation, and markdown rendering functions with both unit and e2e approaches, but have critical gaps: (1) Fixture files (run1.xml, run2.json, run3.xml) are referenced but never created/defined, breaking renderMarkdown test; (2) main() entry point is completely untested; (3) aggregate() function has no direct test; (4) limited error scenarios (only 1 per parser); (5) E2E tests override workflow file itself, coupling tests to implementation. Positive: good organization, proper async handling, e2e isolation strategy, actionlint validation. Would fail in practice due to missing fixtures.
